title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the International Finance Corporation (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1958. (2) It extends1 to the whole of India.
footnote: 1. The Act has now been extended by Act 26 of 1968 to the Union territory Pondicherry, comprising the former French Establishments in India, (w.e.f 1-8-1968).
